---
title: "DOE template"
author: "Bayu Cakra Buana"
date: "10/12/2023"
output: pdf_document
---
# Library
```{r}
library(DoE.base)
library(FrF2)
library(rsm)
library(DoE.wrapper)
library(AlgDesign)
```

\newpage
# Generate an orthogonal array design
```{r}
#Variables 
parameter1 <- c(5.5,5,4.5)
parameter2 <- c(28.5,30,27)
design <- oa.design(nfactors = 2, nlevels = c(length(parameter1), 
                                              length(parameter2)), 
                                              columns = "min3")
head(design)

# Rename the columns with variable names
colnames(design) <- c("parameter1",
                      "parameter2")

# Replace the values in the design with actual variable values
design$parameter1 <- parameter1[design$parameter1]
design$parameter2<- parameter2[design$parameter2]
design <- data.frame(design)
write.csv(design, "DoE.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#innitial Design
print(design)
```
